upcoming_feature: Built for Bangladesh — POS + Free Online Store
hero_subtitle: Sales, stock & billing — all in one place. Built for Bangladeshi shop owners who want less hassle and more profit.
hero_description: From a small grocery to a clothing chain, a pharmacy to a restaurant — handle everything without the end-of-month headaches. No accounting degree needed.
features_heading: Everything Your Shop Needs, All in One Place
features_description: Sales, stock, accounting, reports — 15+ built-in modules so you never need another app.
feature_dashboard_desc: Real-time KPIs — today's revenue, top products, pending orders, and stock alerts at a glance.
feature_pos_desc: Sell in seconds — barcode & camera scanning, variant/serial selection, multiple payment methods, instant receipt.
feature_checkout_desc: Sell in seconds — barcode & camera scanning, variant/serial selection, multiple payment methods, instant receipt.
feature_purchase_desc: Full purchase lifecycle — create drafts, approve orders, receive goods, and track supplier payments & dues.
feature_inventory_desc: Real-time stock levels, manual adjustments with reasons, low-stock alerts, and idle product tracking.
feature_product_desc: Manage variants, serial/batch tracking, bulk Excel import, and print barcode or QR labels.
feature_order_desc: View all sales orders, process returns & refunds, print invoices, and track payment status.
feature_supplier_desc: Supplier profiles, outstanding dues tracking, payment terms, and supplier performance reports.
feature_customer_desc: Customer profiles, loyalty tiers (Normal / Silver / Gold / Platinum), purchase history, and credit balance.
feature_catbrand_desc: Organise your catalogue with category trees, brand profiles, and brand images — synced to your online store.
feature_expense_desc: Record daily business expenses by category (rent, utilities, salaries) with date and description.
feature_accounts_desc: Double-entry bookkeeping — manage ledger accounts and journal entries to keep finances audit-ready.
feature_reporting_desc: Sales, invoices, P&L, tax, stock valuation, low stock, supplier dues, customer analytics — all filterable.
feature_staff_desc: Add employees, assign roles (Cashier / Manager), and control who can access which modules.
feature_barcode_desc: Generate and batch-print barcode or QR code labels for any product directly from the dashboard.
feature_multistore_desc: Manage all your branches from one dashboard — switch stores, compare sales, and sync stock.
feature_notifications_desc: Real-time alerts for low stock, new orders, and system events. Send broadcast announcements to your team.
quick_start_title: Up and Running in 4 Simple Steps
quick_start_desc: No complicated setup, no tech skills needed. From sign-up to your first sale in minutes.
quick_step_1_desc: Enter your email and business name — your account is ready instantly.
quick_step_2_desc: Set your payment methods and shop info just once.
quick_step_3_desc: Add products one by one or bring them all in from Excel.
quick_step_4_desc: Make your first sale — your free online store goes live at the same moment.
cta_title: Join 100+ Shop Owners Growing with Us
cta_desc: More than 100 businesses across Bangladesh are boosting their sales every day. Start free — no credit card, no commitment.
cta_benefits: ✓ Free plan available  ✓ Cancel anytime  ✓ 24/7 support included

contact.page_subtitle: Fill out the form below and our team will get in touch to set up your POS — no complicated process, we'll walk you through it.

header.title: Loved by Business Owners in Bangladesh

testimonials.name: Md. Rakib Hossain
testimonials.review: Before this, I used to write everything in a notebook and lose track. Now I just open the app and see exactly what sold today and what's running low.

testimonials.name: Shamima Akter
testimonials.review: My staff used to make mistakes with manual billing. Since we switched, billing is quick and I don't have to double-check everything.

testimonials.name: Jahidul Islam
testimonials.review: I sell a lot of different items — phones, accessories, cables. The stock tracking saves me from over-ordering. I can see exactly what needs restocking.

testimonials.name: Farhana Rahman
testimonials.review: I have two helpers who are not very tech-savvy. They both learned to use this in less than a day. Checkout is much faster now and the queue moves quickly.

cookie-policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie-policy.description: This Cookie Policy explains how Andgate Technologies uses cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our website and platform.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for basic website functionality and security.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how users interact with our platform.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: Remember your preferences and personalize experience.

control.title: Your Control
control.description: Manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

what_are_cookies.title: What Are Cookies?
what_are_cookies.description: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience by remembering your preferences and understanding how you use our platform.

first_party.title: First-Party Cookies
first_party.description: Set directly by AndgatePOS to enhance functionality and user experience.

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.description: Set by our trusted partners for analytics, security, and service improvements.

essential.title: Essential Cookies (Always Active)
essential.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization. They may be set by us or third parties.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously.

consent.title: Cookie Consent Management
consent.description: When you first visit our website, you'll see a cookie consent banner. You can:
options: Accept all cookies for the full website experience
Customize your preferences by cookie category
Reject optional cookies (essential cookies will still be used)
Change your preferences anytime through the cookie settings

browser.title: Browser Settings
browser.description: You can control cookies through your browser settings:

impact.title: Impact of Disabling Cookies
impact.description: While we respect your choice to disable cookies, please note that some functionality may be affected:

third_party.title: Third-Party Cookies
third_party.description: We work with trusted third-party services that may set their own cookies. These partners help us provide better service:

analytics_partners.title: Analytics Partners
analytics_partners.description: Help us understand usage patterns and improve our service.

security_services.title: Security Services
security_services.description: Protect against fraud and malicious activities.

support_tools.title: Support Tools
support_tools.description: Enable customer support features and live chat.

updates.title: Updates to Cookie Policy
updates.description: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.

notification.title: How We Notify You
methods: Website banner notification for significant changes
Updated "Last Modified" date on this page

contact.title: Questions About Cookies?
contact.description: Contact our privacy team for questions about cookies or to request changes to your cookie preferences.
contact.compliance: ✓ GDPR Compliant ✓ CCPA Compliant ✓ Regular Privacy Audits

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: At Andgate Technologies, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data.

secure_storage.title: Secure Data Storage
secure_storage.description: Your data is encrypted and stored securely with bank-level protection.

transparent.title: Transparent Practices
transparent.description: We clearly explain what data we collect and how we use it.

your_control.title: Your Control
your_control.description: You can access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time.

minimal_data.title: Minimal Data Collection
minimal_data.description: We only collect data necessary to provide our services.

personal_info.title: Personal Information
items: Name, email address, and contact information
Business information (company name, address, tax ID)
Payment information (processed securely by our payment partners)

usage_info.title: Usage Information
items: System usage patterns and feature interactions

customer_data.title: Customer Data
items: Customer information you input into the system

data_security.title: Data Security
data_security.subtitle: Our Security Measures
measures: 256-bit SSL encryption for all data transmission
PCI DSS compliance for payment processing
Regular security audits and penetration testing
Employee security training and background checks

access_control.title: Access and Control
items: View and download your personal data

data_portability.title: Data Portability
items: Export your data in standard formats

data_retention.title: Data Retention
data_retention.description: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations:

items.label: Account Information:
items.text: Retained while your account is active and for 7 years after closure for legal compliance

items.label: Transaction Records:
items.text: Retained for 7 years as required by financial regulations

items.label: Usage Data:
items.text: Aggregated and anonymized data may be retained indefinitely for analytics

third_party.title: Third-Party Services
third_party.description: We work with trusted third-party service providers to deliver our services:

contact.title: Questions About Privacy?
contact.description: We're here to help. Contact our privacy team for any questions or concerns about your data.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: These Terms of Service govern your use of AndgatePOS services. By using our platform, you agree to these terms and conditions.

serviceAgreement.title: Service Agreement
serviceAgreement.description: Your rights and responsibilities when using AndgatePOS.

paymentTerms.title: Payment Terms
paymentTerms.description: Billing, subscriptions, and payment processing details.

dataProtection.title: Data Protection
dataProtection.description: How we handle and protect your business data.

userResponsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.description: Acceptable use policies and account obligations.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.paragraph1: By accessing or using AndgatePOS ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.
acceptance.paragraph2: These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service, including businesses, merchants, and individual users ("Users" or "you").

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.text: By using our Service, you represent that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.intro: AndgatePOS provides cloud-based point-of-sale software and related services including:

requirements.title: Account Requirements
requirements.intro: To access certain features of the Service, you must register for an account. You agree to:
items: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
Maintain and promptly update your account information
Maintain the security of your password and account
Accept responsibility for all activities under your account
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access or security breach

suspension.title: Account Suspension
suspension.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, engage in fraudulent activities, or pose a risk to other users or our Service.

subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription Plans
items: Monthly and annual billing cycles available
Prices subject to change with 30 days notice

transactionFees.title: Transaction Fees
items: Processing fees apply to card transactions
Rates vary by payment method and volume
No hidden fees or setup costs

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.text: Subscription fees are non-refundable except as required by law. Transaction processing fees are non-refundable. You may cancel your subscription at any time.

permitted.title: Permitted Uses
permitted.intro: You may use our Service for lawful business purposes including:

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
items: Attempting to hack, disrupt, or damage our systems
Sharing account credentials with unauthorized parties
Using the Service for illegal activities
Reverse engineering or copying our software

yourData.title: Your Data
yourData.intro: You retain ownership of all data you input into our Service. We serve as a data processor and will handle your data according to our Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws.
items: You are responsible for the accuracy and legality of your data
We will not access your data except as necessary to provide the Service
You can export your data at any time
Data deletion requests will be processed promptly

security.title: Data Security Commitment
security.text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, access controls, and regular security audits. See our Privacy Policy for detailed information.

byYou.title: Termination by You
byYou.intro: You may terminate your account at any time by cancelling your subscription through your account settings or by contacting our support team.
items: Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period
You can export your data before termination
No refunds for unused subscription time

byUs.title: Termination by Us
byUs.text: We may suspend or terminate your account for violations of these Terms, non-payment, or other legitimate business reasons with appropriate notice.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.paragraph1: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, ANDGATE TECHNOLOGIES SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES.
liability.paragraph2: OUR TOTAL LIABILITY TO YOU FOR ANY DAMAGES ARISING FROM OR RELATED TO THESE TERMS OR YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT PAID BY YOU TO US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

serviceLevel.title: Service Level Remedies
serviceLevel.text: For service level failures, our liability is limited to service credits as outlined in our SLA, which constitutes your sole and exclusive remedy for such failures.

changes.title: 10. Changes to Terms
changes.paragraph1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes by email or through our Service at least 30 days before the changes take effect.
changes.paragraph2: Your continued use of the Service after the changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. If you do not agree to the new Terms, you must stop using the Service.

notification.title: Notification Methods
items: Email notifications to registered account email

contact.title: Questions About Our Terms?
contact.description: Our legal team is available to clarify any questions about these Terms of Service.

all_features_desc: 15+ built-in modules covering sales, stock, purchases, finance, staff, and reports — nothing to install separately.
core_pos_desc: Long queue at the counter? Bill in seconds — scan a barcode, take cash or card, print the receipt. Done.
core_inventory_desc: Know before you run out. Real-time stock levels, low-stock alerts, and purchase orders — so you never lose a sale to an empty shelf.
core_analytics_desc: No more end-of-month headaches. Sales, profit & loss, stock value — any report, any time, one click.
business_types_heading: Works for Any Type of Shop
business_types_subtitle: From a corner pharmacy to a multi-branch chain — fits 10+ types of businesses across Bangladesh.
business_type_fashion_desc: Manage garments, sizes, colors and seasonal stock with ease.
business_type_grocery_desc: High-volume barcode checkout, stock level alerts, purchase orders, and multi-payment support.
business_type_electronics_desc: Warranty tracking, serial numbers, and supplier management.
business_type_beauty_desc: Customer loyalty tiers, purchase history, product variants, and detailed customer profiles.
business_type_pharmacy_desc: Serial number tracking, supplier management, stock alerts, and detailed purchase & inventory reports.
map_subtitle: From Dhaka to Cox's Bazar — shop owners across all 8 divisions trust us every day.
login_panel_headline: Welcome back! Your shop is waiting.
login_panel_sub: Sales, stock & reports — all in one place.
login_panel_quote: Since switching to AndgatePOS, managing all my stores from one place has saved me hours every day.
register_panel_headline: Start your free POS journey today.
register_panel_sub: Set up your store in minutes. No technical knowledge needed — just sign up and start selling.
register_perk_1_desc: Start with no credit card required
register_perk_2_desc: Add as many products as you need
ecommerce_heading: Your POS. Your Online Store. Automatically.
ecommerce_subheading: Every plan includes a free Hawkeri-powered online store.
ecommerce_desc: No extra setup. No separate inventory. Add products in your dashboard — they appear in your online store instantly, ready for customers to browse and buy.
ecommerce_f1_desc: Products added to your POS appear instantly in your online store.
ecommerce_f2_desc: Full catalogue structure pulled directly from your POS data.
ecommerce_f3_desc: Share your unique store link on WhatsApp, Facebook & more.
ecommerce_f4_desc: Included free with every plan — Starter to Enterprise.
business_type_mobile_desc: IMEI/serial tracking for handsets, accessories inventory, purchase orders from distributors, and barcode labels.
business_type_footwear_desc: Manage size and colour variants, brand-wise stock levels, purchase orders, and barcode label printing.
business_type_hardware_desc: Large product catalogue, bulk purchase orders, supplier dues tracking, and low-stock alerts.
business_type_stationery_desc: Barcode scanning, bulk Excel product import, seasonal stock management, and supplier orders.
business_type_bakery_desc: Fast POS checkout, receipt printing, daily expense tracking, and real-time inventory for food items.
